messages.managedExternally: This admin account is managed by a directory service (AD/LDAP). For security reasons, resetting or changing the password locally is not supported. Please change your password on the enterprise directory service platform.

form.newPasswordHelp: New password must comply with configured password security policy

validation.newPasswordMin: New password must be at least 6 characters

emailMfa.disableCodeHint: Enter the latest 6-digit verification code just sent to your bound email address.

webauthn.title: Hardware Security Key
webauthn.subtitle: Use a FIDO2/WebAuthn compatible hardware security key (e.g. YubiKey) or platform authenticator (Touch ID / Windows Hello)
webauthn.deleteConfirm: After deletion, this security key cannot be used for login verification. Confirm delete?
webauthn.namingDesc: Give your security key a name for easy management
